decision: request.json gains schema_version: 1 via typed TrialRequestFile
authority: operator delegation 2026-07-05: accept high-confidence plan recommendations
rationale: additive key; existing images json.loads and pick keys; docker request test extended

decision: holdout.json v1 schema with kind discriminator (assertion|pytest|command); absent kind = opaque bespoke grading unchanged
rationale: purely additive contract; existing files remain valid forever

decision: additive optional tasks.yaml fields (inline holdout sugar, EnvironmentSpec keys), written pre-lock only
rationale: task sha covers raw bytes; existing locked files untouched

decision: fix control-reuse fingerprint task key plugins -> plugin_ids; bump FINGERPRINT_VERSION
rationale: live defect (docs+grade use plugin_ids); FINGERPRINT_VERSION is the designated change lever; old bundles refuse cleanly

decision: add sdk/images/hermetic/webkit to .importlinter source lists as they land; add 'sdk is a leaf consumer' contract
rationale: mechanical; completeness meta-test forces same-commit updates

decision: re-document 'only harbor talks to Docker' as 'only harness.hermetic talks to Docker'
rationale: claim already false via grade/container.py; re-scoping is the honest fix; AST harbor-naming sweep unchanged

decision: events.py declarative EventSpec registry; constructors stay as thin wrappers; byte-identity proven by Phase-0 constructor-replay golden before conversion
rationale: canonical_line sorts keys so bytes depend only on (key set, values); golden pins it

decision: verdict-JSON format instruction stays in rubrics for now; SDK ships a rubric template as the single source; packet-framing move NOT taken
rationale: plan's own recommendation was to not bundle this contract change; template solves the duplication without moving packet_sha256

decision: tasks.yaml read side stays lenient; ship a validate-tasks lint verb (write-side builders are strict)
rationale: read-side strictness would touch a hash-feeding loader; lint verb gets the UX win risk-free

decision: fake engine gains fail-closed proxy_log_missing parity when a proxy is configured (shared EngineBase scan)
rationale: behavior change confined to configured-proxy fakes; scheduler tests stop scripting the reason string by hand

decision: wire VERDI_REQUIRE_PROXY=1 into the CI docker job
rationale: consistent with the fail-closed posture of the docker/browser switches; guard test already exists

decision: analyze process diagnostics derive dimensions from the union of ledgered dim_ids; additive rubric-file sha on process_score events
rationale: option (a) of refactor 06 §7: no new un-committed inputs; honest about what actually scored

decision: serve/review/author JS moves from escaped Python strings to package-data .js files inlined at serve/bundle time
rationale: byte-equivalent output; lintable/diffable JS; Python<->JS mirrors gain parity tests or server-shipped values
